section1.title: 1. Information Collection
section1.quote: "Your privacy is our highest priority. We collect only what is essential to deliver the best experience."
section1.body: We collect information you provide directly when creating an account, such as your name, email address and password. Additionally, we record data about your interactions with the catalog, such as reserved books, return deadlines and reading history.

section2.title: 2. Use and Storage
section2.intro: The collected data is used exclusively for:
section2.item1: Guarantee the integrity of the book lending process;
section2.item2: Notify you about return deadlines and title availability;
section2.item3: Improve reading recommendations and the system interface;
section2.item4: Comply with legal and administrative obligations of the institution.
section2.closing: We use state-of-the-art encryption and rigorous security protocols to ensure your data remains protected against unauthorized access.

section3.title: 3. Sharing
section3.body: We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. Information sharing only occurs with essential service providers for the platform's operation (e.g., transactional email services) and under strict confidentiality.

section4.title: 4. Your Rights
section4.body: You have the right to access, correct or delete your personal data at any time through your account settings. For complete data deletion, contact the library administrator.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Guidelines for a harmonious coexistence on our platform.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.body: By accessing and using the Library System, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions. This system is intended exclusively for educational and collection management purposes.

section2.title: 2. User Responsibilities
section2.intro: As a library user, you commit to:
section2.item1: Take care of the physical integrity of borrowed physical books.
section2.item3: Do not share your access credentials with third parties.

section3.title: 3. Penalties
section3.intro: Failure to comply with the terms may result in:

penalty1.title: Temporary Suspension
penalty1.description: Prevention from making new reservations for a determined period.

penalty2.title: Administrative Fines
penalty2.description: As per the institution's internal regulations.

section4.title: 4. Modifications
section4.body: We reserve the right to change these terms at any time. We will notify users of significant changes via registered email or in-system alerts.

terms.footer: By continuing to use the system, you declare that you are aware of and agree to all guidelines above.
